soil_analysis_desc: Run a new soil analysis to find the best crop for your current land type.
library_desc: Explore sustainable growing methods for Rice, Maize, and more.
map_desc: Explore the top-yield zones for Kavrepalanchok and neighboring regions.
credentials_desc: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
join_community: Join our community of smart farmers
empowering_farmers_desc: Empowering farmers with smart sustainable tools
target_weather_desc: Target weather data for specific agricultural zones.
knowledge_desc: Explore detailed growth guides for various Himalayan crops.
search_crops_placeholder: Search by crop name (e.g. Rice, Wheat)...
are_you_sure_sign_out: Are you sure you want to sign out?
ai_prediction_desc: Get personalized crop recommendations based on your soil and local condition using our advanced AI algorithms.
real_time_weather_desc: Stay ahead of the weather with precise, hyper-local forecasts tailored specifically for your farm location.
smart_library_desc: Access a wealth of knowledge on modern farming techniques, disease management, and sustainable practices.
about_desc: Smart Krishi Sathi is more than just an app; it's a digital ecosystem designed to transform the lives of farmers through technology, community, and sustainable practices.
sustainable_growth_desc: Promoting farming techniques that preserve the environment for future generations.
farmer_empowerment_desc: Providing small-scale farmers with the tools and knowledge to compete in global markets.
innovation_desc: Leveraging AI and data analytics to optimize crop yields and minimize risks.
our_story_p1: Founded in 2026, Smart Krishi Sathi emerged from a simple observation: while technology was advancing rapidly, the backbone of our society—farmers—were being left behind.
our_story_p2: We set out to build a platform that speaks the language of the land, providing real-time weather alerts, disease detection, and yield predictions that are both accurate and accessible.
footer_desc: Empowering farmers with AI-driven insights for a sustainable and prosperous future in agriculture.
copyright_text: © 2026 Smart Krishi Sathi. design and develop by Yubraj Tamang
ai_engine_desc: Advanced XGBoost model analyzing soil chemistry, local geography, and seasonal patterns for optimal crop recommendations.
farming_log_desc: Track and manage your seasonal agricultural activities.
no_activities_found: No activities found. Log your first activity today!
reminder_help_text: You will receive a notification at this time.
activity_notes_placeholder: Add any specific notes or observations here...
weather_summary: Current wind speed is {wind} km/h. Conditions look suitable for field work today.
confirm_clear_notifications: Are you sure you want to clear all notifications?
notifications_desc: Stay updated with your agricultural alerts
no_new_notifications: No new notifications at this time.
privacy_sec1_desc: We collect information to provide better services to all our users. This includes:
privacy_sec1_li1_text: Name, email address, and phone number when you register.
privacy_sec1_li2_text: To provide accurate weather forecasts and localized agricultural insights.
privacy_sec1_li3_text: Information on how you interact with our platform to improve user experience.
privacy_sec2_desc: The information we collect is used to:
privacy_sec2_li1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services.
privacy_sec2_li2: Send technical notices, updates, and support messages.
privacy_sec2_li3: Analyze trends and usage to enhance the platform's AI predictions.
privacy_sec3_desc: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy_sec4_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@krishisathi.com.
terms_sec1_desc: By accessing or using Smart Krishi Sathi, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all terms, do not use the service.
terms_sec2_desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms_sec3_desc1: The insights and recommendations provided by Smart Krishi Sathi are based on AI models and data analysis. They should be used as a guide and do not replace professional agricultural consultation.
terms_sec3_desc2: We are not liable for any crop loss or financial damages resulting from the use of our predictions.
terms_sec4_desc: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to our service immediately, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these terms or is harmful to other users.
terms_sec5_desc: We may modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the service after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
support_team_desc: Our team is here to support you in every step of your agricultural journey.
